title: AI Agents Authentication: How Autonomous Systems Prove Identity
snippet: Explores how AI agents authenticate, risks of overly broad scopes, long-lived refresh tokens, and shared tokens across agents without distinct ownership. Notes that authentication decisions are rarely revisited as agents scale.

title: OpenAI's Coding Agent Flaw Exposed GitHub Passwords

title: Introducing HUMAN Verified AI Agent: An Open-Source Foundation for Trustworthy Agent Identity
snippet: Open-source demonstration of cryptographically authenticated communication between AI agents and digital services using HTTP Message Signatures (RFC 9421). Agents sign every HTTP request and signatures are verified by a gateway service using a public key registry.

title: ZeroID: Open-source identity platform for autonomous AI agents

title: Introducing the Agent Governance Toolkit: Open-source runtime security for AI agents

title: feat: implement hierarchical agent delegation with allowed_agents parameter

title: Agent Identity and Lifecycle — AutoGen
